dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses volume-price confirmation logic. Entry conditions translate to: rising volume + rising price = BUY, rising volume + falling price = SELL. Exit logic triggers on weak rally condition (falling volume with rising price) to close long positions or when price reversal occurs. Volume trend detected via volume > prev_volume (rising) or volume < prev_volume (falling). Price trend detected via close > prev_close (rising) or close < prev_close (falling).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses volume-price confirmation logic. Entry conditions translate to: rising volume + rising price = BUY, rising volume + falling price = SELL. Exit logic triggers on weak rally condition (falling volume with rising price) to close long positions or when price reversal occurs. Volume trend detected via volume > prev_volume (rising) or volume < prev_volume (falling). Price trend detected via close > prev_close (rising) or close < prev_close (falling).

source_rule_text: When volume is rising and price is rising, volume confirms the price rise as a buy signal; when volume is rising and price is falling, volume confirms the price drop as a sell signal; when volume is falling and price is rising, volume indicates a weak rally suggesting caution on long positions.
